rules.rule: Raw private notes, health status and personal circumstances must never enter the generation prompt or client-facing output.
Private state may only be converted into non-sensitive controls such as warmth, push, humour and message length.
Do not diagnose, prescribe treatment or make unsupported medical claims.
Do not invent or automatically reuse personal stories. Public stories require explicit approval and channel permission.
Use only the minimum client data required for the current message and respect consent and privacy class.
Client messages remain drafts until reviewed and approved by Jeffrey or an authorised human.
